requirement_topic.en: UAE EV Charger Conformity Assessment Scope — MoIAT / ESMA
requirement_topic.zh: 阿联酋电动汽车充电桩合格评定适用范围——MoIAT / ESMA
requirement_topic.zht: 阿聯酋電動汽車充電樁合格評定適用範圍——MoIAT / ESMA

summary.en: A claimed UAE Cabinet Resolution No. 175 of 2025, published in Official Gazette No. 812, has been reported as creating an ECAS certification mandate for public and commercial electric vehicle supply equipment effective 27 May 2026, but this could not be confirmed on UAE Legislation or another official source during this audit. Treat the claim as pending confirmation and verify the current MoIAT / ESMA conformity route, product status, and any project or emirate requirements before placing public or commercial EVSE on the UAE market.
summary.zh: 有资料称阿联酋2025年第175号内阁决议（刊载于第812号官方公报）将自2026年5月27日起对公共和商用电动汽车供电设备设立ECAS认证强制要求，但本次审查未能在阿联酋法规平台或其他官方来源确认该说法。应将该要求视为待确认，并在公共或商用EVSE进入阿联酋市场前核实当前MoIAT / ESMA合格评定路径、产品状态及任何项目或酋长国要求。
summary.zht: 有資料稱阿聯酋2025年第175號內閣決議（刊載於第812號官方公報）將自2026年5月27日起對公共和商用電動汽車供電設備設立ECAS認證強制要求，但本次審查未能在阿聯酋法規平台或其他官方來源確認該說法。應將該要求視為待確認，並在公共或商用EVSE進入阿聯酋市場前核實當前MoIAT / ESMA合格評定路徑、產品狀態及任何項目或酋長國要求。

standards_or_laws: Claimed UAE Cabinet Resolution No. 175 of 2025 — ECAS certification for public and commercial EVSE [pending official confirmation]
Claimed UAE Official Gazette No. 812 — effective date 27 May 2026 [pending official confirmation]
UAE RoHS / electrical-product conformity assessment where in scope
Project or utility procurement requirements for EV charging equipment

summary.en: China-market chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1 for conductive charging system requirements and GB/T 20234 connector standards. China CCC or GB/T test evidence may support engineering review, but it does not by itself establish UAE conformity assessment status or DEWA project acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1传导充电系统要求及GB/T 20234连接器标准准备文件。中国CCC或GB/T测试证据可支持工程审查，但其本身不能证明阿联酋合格评定状态或DEWA项目验收。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1傳導充電系統要求及GB/T 20234連接器標準準備文件。中國CCC或GB/T測試證據可支持工程審查，但其本身不能證明阿聯酋合格評定狀態或DEWA項目驗收。

gap.en: The gap is ECAS scope confirmation for public and commercial EVSE, plus supporting evidence mapping. Exporters should map the UAE importer, HS code, charger type, rated voltage, radio functions, cable and coupler accessories, RoHS status, IEC safety/EMC reports, Arabic/English labelling, and project owner requirements before stating that a charger is UAE-ready.
gap.zh: 差距在于确认公共和商用EVSE的ECAS适用范围，以及配套证据映射。出口商在宣称充电桩可进入阿联酋前，应映射阿联酋进口商、HS编码、充电桩类型、额定电压、无线功能、电缆及耦合器附件、RoHS状态、IEC安全/EMC报告、阿拉伯语/英语标签和项目业主要求。
gap.zht: 差距在於確認公共和商用EVSE的ECAS適用範圍，以及配套證據映射。出口商在宣稱充電樁可進入阿聯酋前，應映射阿聯酋進口商、HS編碼、充電樁類型、額定電壓、無線功能、電纜及耦合器附件、RoHS狀態、IEC安全/EMC報告、阿拉伯語/英語標籤和項目業主要求。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional / pending confirmation — claimed UAE Cabinet Resolution No. 175 of 2025 and Official Gazette No. 812 EVSE ECAS mandate effective 27 May 2026 could not be confirmed on an official source during this audit; verify current MoIAT / ESMA scope before asserting a mandatory route
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or recommended depending on China CCC scope and GB/T product category; GB/T evidence is not a UAE conformity substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim automatic UAE EVSE market access from China CCC or GB/T reports. The claimed UAE Cabinet Resolution No. 175 of 2025 / Official Gazette No. 812 ECAS mandate for public and commercial EVSE remains pending official confirmation; verify the current MoIAT / ESMA route alongside any component, wireless, RoHS, emirate, or project approval route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应凭中国CCC或GB/T报告宣称自动满足阿联酋EVSE市场准入。关于阿联酋2025年第175号内阁决议/第812号官方公报对公共和商用EVSE设立ECAS强制要求的说法仍待官方确认；应核实现行MoIAT / ESMA路径，并同时处理部件、无线、RoHS、酋长国或项目审批路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應憑中國CCC或GB/T報告宣稱自動滿足阿聯酋EVSE市場准入。關於阿聯酋2025年第175號內閣決議／第812號官方公報對公共和商用EVSE設立ECAS強制要求的說法仍待官方確認；應核實現行MoIAT / ESMA路徑，並同時處理部件、無線、RoHS、酋長國或項目審批路徑。

requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23 Safety Baseline vs China GB/T 18487
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23安全基线与中国GB/T 18487对照
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851-1 / IEC 61851-23安全基線與中國GB/T 18487對照

summary.en: IEC 61851-1 is the international baseline for conductive EV supply equipment general requirements, while IEC 61851-23 addresses DC EV charging stations. UAE utilities, project owners, and conformity reviewers commonly request IEC-family evidence for EVSE safety features such as control pilot behavior, protective earthing, isolation, interlocks, overcurrent and overtemperature protection, emergency stop logic where applicable, and DC station protection functions.
summary.zh: IEC 61851-1是电动汽车传导供电设备通用要求的国际基线，IEC 61851-23适用于直流电动汽车充电站。阿联酋公用事业、项目业主和合格评定审查方通常会要求IEC体系证据，用于证明EVSE安全功能，例如控制导引、保护接地、绝缘、互锁、过流及过温保护、适用时的急停逻辑，以及直流充电站保护功能。
summary.zht: IEC 61851-1是電動汽車傳導供電設備通用要求的國際基線，IEC 61851-23適用於直流電動汽車充電站。阿聯酋公用事業、項目業主和合格評定審查方通常會要求IEC體系證據，用於證明EVSE安全功能，例如控制導引、保護接地、絕緣、互鎖、過流及過溫保護、適用時的急停邏輯，以及直流充電站保護功能。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2014 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle charging station
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an electric vehicle for control of DC charging

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging general requirements, with China-specific GB/T connector and communication ecosystems. It is useful as a design reference but should not be treated as direct IEC 61851 evidence without a clause-by-clause gap assessment and test reports accepted by the UAE project route.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电通用要求，并配套中国特有的GB/T接口和通信体系。该标准可作为设计参考，但在未完成逐条差异评估并取得阿联酋项目路径认可的测试报告前，不应视为IEC 61851的直接证据。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電通用要求，並配套中國特有的GB/T接口和通訊體系。該標準可作為設計參考，但在未完成逐條差異評估並取得阿聯酋項目路徑認可的測試報告前，不應視為IEC 61851的直接證據。

gap.en: The exporter should prepare an IEC 61851 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety test reports, DC-station IEC 61851-23 evidence where applicable, protective device ratings, thermal derating evidence for UAE ambient conditions, and installation instructions aligned with the intended utility or project approval route.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851逐条矩阵、认可实验室IEC安全测试报告、适用时的直流站IEC 61851-23证据、保护器件额定值、适配阿联酋环境温度的热降额证据，以及与目标公用事业或项目审批路径一致的安装说明。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851逐條矩陣、認可實驗室IEC安全測試報告、適用時的直流站IEC 61851-23證據、保護器件額定值、適配阿聯酋環境溫度的熱降額證據，以及與目標公用事業或項目審批路徑一致的安裝說明。

mandatory_status.target: Project and scope-dependent — IEC 61851 evidence is typically required by utility, tender, conformity, or installation approval routes; confirm exact mandatory status for the charger type and emirate
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 baseline applies to China domestic design and certification routes; it is not direct UAE acceptance evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487 as a starting point only. UAE-facing EVSE documentation should include IEC 61851-1 evidence and IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, plus a UAE project-specific installation and thermal review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487作为起点。面向阿联酋的EVSE文件应包括IEC 61851-1证据，直流站还应包括IEC 61851-23证据，并完成针对阿联酋项目的安装及热环境审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487作為起點。面向阿聯酋的EVSE文件應包括IEC 61851-1證據，直流站還應包括IEC 61851-23證據，並完成針對阿聯酋項目的安裝及熱環境審查。
